backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing audio post management, user profiles, favorites, comments, and access control with blob storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: replacing the header logo with a user-uploaded speaker logo and positioning the slogan text below the header separator line.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including App, Header, navigation, search, audio cards, upload forms, player, and page components with their key features and styling details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, and component states.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SPEAKR application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes, QueryClient, InternetIdentity, PlayerProvider, and onboarding redirect logic with gradient background layout.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests with a two-column grid layout and scrollable container.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component with premium styling, shadow effects, and integration with feed filter state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Empty state hero component for dashboard showing welcome message, upload CTA, and profile completion progress indicator with animated illustration.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Favori: Displays a card showing the user's favorited audio posts, converting backend AudioPost objects to MockAudioItem format for rendering with AudioCard components.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays user's uploaded audio content with edit, delete, and play functionality, including dialogs for editing post metadata and confirmation for deletion.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows user statistics including total uploads and total listens in a card with formatted numbers and icons.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Main audio post card component with play/pause, like/dislike, comments, audio replies, favorites, and delete functionality, supporting both backend and draft items.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplie: Collapsible section that displays audio replies to a post, fetching and converting backend AudioPost replies to MockAudioItem format for rendering.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplyD: Dialog for creating audio replies to posts, handling audio file upload/recording, validation, and submission with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of text comments with avatars and timestamps, showing an empty state when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedHeroBan: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image for audio items, avoiding placeholder images.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: A multi-select dropdown component for choosing languages with search, custom language addition, and checkbox selection. Displays selected count or language names in the trigger button.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays a centered header banner image with fallback text 'SPEAKR' and includes a top-left dropdown menu. Handles image loading errors gracefully.
A dropdown menu with navigation links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: A fixed floating button in the top-right corner that navigates to the feed home page. Hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: A fixed floating button with popover for filtering feed content by language, featuring search, custom language addition, and checkbox selection. Hidden when mini-player is open.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main application header with centered logo, left-side menu dropdown and authentication buttons, right-side search bar, and primary navigation. Handles login/logout with Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Navigation bar component displaying Feed, Explore, and Upload links with icons. Highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: A multi-step onboarding wizard with progress indicator that introduces users to discovering content, sharing audio, and using the player. Includes animated speaker icon and skip/complete actions.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: A fixed bottom mini-player bar component that displays the currently playing audio with thumbnail, title, creator info, playback controls (play/pause, skip, seek slider), volume control, and a close button.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: A search input component with a search icon that filters audio content and auto-selects the default language when the user focuses or types in the search field.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: A tabbed component allowing users to either upload an audio file or record audio directly from their microphone, with support for multiple audio formats, recording time limits (3 hours max), and preview playback.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A combobox dropdown component for selecting or creating custom categories, using a Command palette interface with search functionality and the ability to add new categories on the fly.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: A comprehensive audio upload form that handles title, description, category, thumbnail, audio file selection/recording, language selection, duration validation, and submits the data to the backend with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: A custom hook that validates audio file duration against a 3-hour maximum limit by loading the audio metadata and returning any validation errors with formatted duration messages.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a constant array of predefined audio categories including 'All', 'Entertainment', 'Technology', 'Food', 'Sports', 'Politics', 'Music', and 'Work', with a TypeScript type export.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Provides category-to-color mapping functions for consistent theming, including gradient backgrounds and badge variants for each category with light/dark mode support.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories with additional interests (Art & Design, Business, Comedy, Education, etc.) to create a comprehensive list of user interests for selection.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a comprehensive list of 184+ ISO 639-1 language codes with labels, including a 'none' option for music, exported as SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES array.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioReplies.ts: React Query hook that fetches audio post replies for a given postId by filtering the user's content for matching replyTo values.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom user-defined languages stored in localStorage, providing duplicate detection, alphabetical sorting, and merging with built-in languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useFavorites.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's favorite audio posts from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: React Query hook that fetches user's audio posts and provides mutations for editing and deleting posts with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Hook for managing onboarding completion state in localStorage with methods to mark complete or reset the onboarding flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query mutations for audio post operations (add, remove, listen, favorites) with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: React Query hook that fetches user statistics from the backend actor when authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes, including OKLCH color palette inspired by SPEAKR branding (warm red-orange primary, cyan-blue accent), premium typography styles, and reusable component classes for glass effects and card elevations.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage with functions to save, retrieve, and delete drafts, converting File objects to data URLs for storage and providing a subscription mechanism for draft change notifications.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random number generation, creating unique waveform patterns and gradients with category-specific OKLCH color schemes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and InternetIdentity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, and exports an array of six mock audio items with sample data for testing.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a simple About page with placeholder content describing SPEAKR's mission to empower creators and listeners.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page with tabbed login and registration forms, including email/password inputs and an interests selection component for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a simple Contact page with placeholder content indicating contact channels are being set up.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that requires authentication, displays user's principal ID, and shows either an empty hero state or statistics/favorites/content sections based on whether the user has uploaded content.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Explore page displaying a grid of category cards with procedural cover images; clicking a category filters the feed and navigates to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that displays audio items from mock data, draft items, and backend content, with filtering by search query, category, and language; shows appropriate empty states when no content matches filters.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Placeholder help page with a "coming soon" message for guides and FAQ content.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Onboarding page that displays a wizard component and marks onboarding as complete when finished or skipped, then navigates to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Placeholder privacy policy page with a "coming soon" message.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Placeholder terms of service page with a "coming soon" message.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Upload page that renders an UploadForm component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider managing global audio player state including playback, progress tracking, volume control, and the currently playing audio item using an HTML5 Audio element.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store with persistence for feed filters (search query, category, languages), including auto-selection of browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and animation keyframes for accordions and speaker pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking architectural decisions, features, and requirements for a web application with audio uploads, favorites, replies, and a compact header layout with speaker logo and branding elements.
